name: sap-b1
description: Connects Claude to a hosted SAP Business One Service Layer MCP server and bundles skills for the sales and purchasing lifecycles, invoices, credit memos, payments, journal entries, service calls, master data, and read-only lookups. Chart-of-accounts and VAT specifics are resolved live per company database, so one plugin serves every tenant.

mcp_url.title: SAP B1 MCP server URL
mcp_url.description: HTTPS endpoint of your company's hosted SAP B1 MCP server, including the MCP path (for example https://sap.yourcompany.com/mcp). Each company database has its own server URL.
